2605.07323.title: Discovering Ordinary Differential Equations with LLM-Based Qualitative and Quantitative Evaluation
2605.07323.paper_summary: Discovering governing differential equations from observational data is a fundamental challenge in scientific machine learning. Existing symbolic regression approaches rely primarily on quantitative metrics; however, real-world differential equation modeling also requires incorporating domain knowledge to ensure physical plausibility. To address this gap, we propose DoLQ, a method for discovering ordinary differential equations with LLM-based qualitative and quantitative evaluation. DoLQ employs a multi-agent architecture: a Sampler Agent proposes dynamic system candidates, a Parameter Optimizer refines equations for accuracy, and a Scientist Agent leverages an LLM to conduct both qualitative and quantitative evaluations and synthesize their results to iteratively guide the search. Experiments on multi-dimensional ordinary differential equation benchmarks demonstrate that DoLQ achieves superior performance compared to existing methods, not only attaining higher success rates but also more accurately recovering the correct symbolic terms of ground truth equations. Our code is available at https://github.com/Bon99yun/DoLQ.
2605.07323.paper_summary_zh: 發現觀測數據中的治理微分方程是科學機器學習中的一個基本挑戰。現有的符號回歸方法主要依賴於定量指標；然而，現實世界的微分方程建模還需要納入領域知識，以確保物理上的合理性。為了解決這一問題，我們提出了 DoLQ，一種基於 LLM 的定性和定量評估的普通微分方程發現方法。DoLQ 採用多代理架構：一個取樣代理提出動態系統候選，參數優化器對方程進行精確度的細化，科學家代理則利用 LLM 進行定性和定量評估，並綜合其結果以迭代地指導搜索。在多維普通微分方程基準測試中的實驗表明，DoLQ 的性能優於現有方法，不僅成功率更高，而且更準確地恢復了真實方程的正確符號項。我們的代碼可在 https://github.com/Bon99yun/DoLQ 獲得。
2605.07323.author: Sum Kyun Song et.al.
2605.07323.authors: Sum Kyun Song, Bong Gyun Shin, Jae Yong Lee
